name: MoneyGram
description_short: San Diego's MoneyGram at 3327 Rosecrans St offers check cashing and money transfer services seven days a week.
description_long:
MoneyGram at 3327 Rosecrans St in San Diego, CA is a standalone check-cashing location offering money transfer services. Open 7AM to 10PM every day of the week, this San Diego spot provides convenient hours for residents and visitors needing quick financial transactions.

This MoneyGram location in San Diego specializes in check cashing and money transfers. For questions about specific services, fees, or processing times, call +1 800-746-7287 directly.

When you visit MoneyGram at 3327 Rosecrans St in San Diego, bring a valid government-issued ID. Whether you need to cash a check, send money domestically or internationally, or handle other money services, this location operates seven days a week from 7AM to 10PM.
pros: Extensive San Diego location network with 56+ service points providing high accessibility
Multiple partner types including retail chains (CVS) and specialized check-cashing businesses for convenience
Both online and offline transaction options allowing flexible money management
Extended hours at many locations, with some open until 10-11 PM for after-hours access
Ability to send and receive money domestically and internationally from single platform
Low barrier to entry—many locations in underserved neighborhoods with limited banking options
cons: Dependent on third-party agent locations means service quality varies by location and operator
No direct control over hours or service standards; reliant on partner business decisions
Transaction fees not disclosed on location finder page, limiting price transparency upfront
Agent network approach means customer service issues cannot be resolved at MoneyGram corporate level
Privacy concerns due to extensive cookie and personal data collection across platform
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers without access to traditional banking services
Immigrants and international workers sending remittances to family abroad
Consumers preferring cash-based financial transactions over digital banking
People in neighborhoods with limited banking infrastructure but nearby CVS or check-cashing retailers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need quick access to cash transfers, check cashing, and bill payment services through convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that service quality depends entirely on partner location reliability and hours, with no direct MoneyGram corporate support or standardized pricing visibility across the network.
services: Online money management and transfer initiation
Location finder with address and ZIP code search
meta_description: MoneyGram at 3327 Rosecrans St, San Diego, CA. Check cashing and money transfers, open 7AM–10PM daily.
